message:
feat: add retain_graph, grad context managers, LR schedulers, linalg kernels, and Module introspection

ft-autograd:
- Add retain_graph option to BackwardOptions so the computation graph
  survives multiple backward passes instead of being consumed
- Add consumed/consumed_boundary/grad_enabled state to Tape
- Add GraphConsumed/TensorGraphConsumed error variants
- Add is_grad_enabled/set_grad_enabled on Tape and TensorTape
- Add full backward() method on Tape and TensorTape (previously only
  backward_with_options existed)

ft-api (FrankenTorchSession):
- Add grad context managers: no_grad_enter/exit, enable_grad_enter/exit,
  set_grad_enabled, is_grad_enabled
- Add with_no_grad/with_enable_grad closure-based scoped context managers
- Add tensor_lu_factor, tensor_linalg_lu, tensor_lu_solve, tensor_linalg_qr
  for linear algebra decompositions
- 475+ lines of new tests covering grad context, LU/QR operations

ft-core (DType + DenseTensor):
- Add DType methods: element_size, is_floating_point, is_integer, is_bool,
  promote (type promotion rules matching PyTorch)
- Add TensorMeta::with_dtype builder
- Add TensorStorage typed storage enum (F64/F32/I64/I32/I16/I8/Bool)
  with len/is_empty/dtype/as_f64/as_f32/to_f64_vec/to_f32_vec
- Add DenseTensor: from_typed_storage, from_storage_f32,
  from_contiguous_values_f32, contiguous_values, contiguous_values_f32,
  contiguous_values_as_f64, typed_storage, storage, meta, id,
  storage_id, version accessors

ft-kernel-cpu:
- Add lu_factor_contiguous_f64 (LU decomposition with partial pivoting)
- Add lu_unpack (extract P, L, U from factored result)
- Add lu_solve_contiguous_f64 (solve Ax=b via LU factors)
- Add qr_contiguous_f64 (Householder QR decomposition)
- Supporting types: LuFactorResult, LuResult, QrResult

ft-nn (Module trait + implementations):
- Add named_parameters_own() and named_children() to Module trait for
  PyTorch-style hierarchical parameter/module introspection
- Add free functions: children, named_parameters, named_modules, modules
  for recursive traversal matching PyTorch's module.named_parameters(),
  module.named_modules(), etc.
- Implement named_parameters_own for Linear, Conv1d, Conv2d,
  ConvTranspose1d, MultiheadAttention, LayerNorm, GroupNorm,
  InstanceNorm1d/2d, BatchNorm1d/2d, Embedding
- Implement named_children for Sequential, ModuleList, ModuleDict,
  MultiheadAttention
- 377 lines of new tests for introspection API

ft-optim:
- Add get_lr/set_lr to Optimizer trait with implementations for all
  6 optimizers (SGD, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, RAdam)
- Add LRScheduler trait with get_lr/step/state_dict/load_state_dict
- Add SchedulerState for serializable scheduler checkpointing
- Add StepLR scheduler (decays LR by gamma every step_size epochs)
  with verbose logging, last_epoch resume, and state dict round-trip
- 312 lines of StepLR tests

ft-conformance:
- Update BackwardOptions usage to include retain_graph field across
  all scheduler test cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
